name: castrecall
description: CastRecall — turn podcast listening into retrievable memory. An OpenClaw tool plugin that ingests Pocket Casts listens, finds or generates transcripts, and creates approval-gated review candidates.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
